authorities.name: California Department of Fish and Wildlife

sources.title: CCR T14 §7.50(b)(105) — Parker Creek (Mono Co.)
sources.quotedText: (105) Parker Creek (Mono Co.) from Parker Lake to the confluence with Rush Creek. All year. Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used. 0 trout

sources.title: Parker Lake Fishing, Mono County — Dave's Sierra Fishing
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.title: USGS GNIS (The National Map Gazetteer) — Streams layer record for gaz_id 264525, "Parker Creek", Stream, Mono Co., CA
sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":264525,"gaz_name":"Parker Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"} — geometry multipoint; first point (Web Mercator -13258014.52, 4562830.7967) converts to lon -119.098771, lat 37.882433, near Parker Lake (the creek's source), replacing the file's previous coordinate (-119.1150, 37.8250), which was off by ~6.5 km.

parameters.note: Applies from Parker Lake downstream to the confluence with Rush Creek.

regulations.humanSummary: Open all year, catch-and-release, from Parker Lake to the confluence with Rush Creek
regulations.verbatimText: Parker Creek (Mono Co.) from Parker Lake to the confluence with Rush Creek. All year.

regulations.humanSummary: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used
regulations.verbatimText: Only artificial lures with barbless hooks may be used.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
